creator: @sethgolie
transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Panda Express? Yeah, let me get a bowl with the super greens, grilled chicken teriyaki, and the wok fried shrimp in a diet coat. Oh. Actually, no, I changed my mind. Let's get a plate with the super greens, the grilled chicken teriyaki, and the firecracker steak and shrimp with the diet coat. Wow. Shit, I didn't even know you could order like that. Where'd you learn? The MenuFit app lets you know what to order at every restaurant to stay on track with your fitness goals. Damn, I'm gonna download the MenuFit app right now.
caption:
Not sure what to order? The @menufit.app has your back 🙌🏼

Now you can stay FIT while eating out 🔥

Steal these two orders from Panda Express 🐼 

Fit order 1:
Protein Bowl
Super Greens (Side) → Teriyaki Chicken →
Wok-Fired Shrimp + Diet Coke
(660 calories 67 G protein)

Fit order 2:
Plate
Super Greens (Side) → Teriyaki Chicken →
Firecracker Steak & Shrimp → Diet Coke 
(690 calories 70 G protein)

Send this to all your FIT FRIENDS 💪🏼

Save for later ✔️

Follow @sethgolie for high protein meal swaps 🙌🏼

Eating out tips
Macro friendly meals

Men's Health & Fitness 

#fitover40 #macrofriendly
ocr_summary: Panda Express Bigger Plate: 2,300 cal / 70g protein (original) vs 660 cal / 67g protein (swap 1) and 690 cal / 70g protein (swap 2).

swaps.swap_meal: Protein Bowl: Super Greens (Side) + Teriyaki Chicken + Wok-Fired Shrimp + Diet Coke
Plate: Super Greens (Side) + Teriyaki Chicken + Firecracker Steak & Shrimp + Diet Coke

parsed.notes: Single-restaurant reel with two Panda Express swap options. Skit format. Also promotes MenuFit app.
